summary: Iteration 140: Spa Command Dashboard (SPA-OPS) + POS Connector Adapter - All 29 backend tests passed. Fixed 1 bug in /api/spa-ops/utilization (KeyError on missing 'type' field). Tested 10 spa-ops endpoints (seed-demo, kpis/today, kpis/trends, utilization, guest-intel, staff, retail, memberships, reputation, actions) and 7 pos-adapter endpoints (providers, config GET/PUT, drain, test-connection, summary, delivery-log). Verified KPI math (NPS formula, utilization 0..1), token masking security, and no _id leaks.

verified_features.SPA_OPS_seed_demo: PASS - POST /api/spa-ops/seed-demo seeds therapists(5+), rooms(8), members(10), retail(5), feedback(30). Idempotent on subsequent calls.
verified_features.SPA_OPS_kpis_trends: PASS - GET /api/spa-ops/kpis/trends?days=14 returns 14 point time-series with date, bookings, completed, revenue, atr, no_shows
verified_features.SPA_OPS_utilization: PASS - GET /api/spa-ops/utilization returns rooms[] + therapists[] each with utilization 0..1, plus daypart_mix with morning/midday/afternoon/evening keys
verified_features.SPA_OPS_guest_intel: PASS - GET /api/spa-ops/guest-intel returns vip_today[], in_house_today[], rebook_prompts[], counts{vip,in_house,rebook_candidates}
verified_features.SPA_OPS_retail: PASS - GET /api/spa-ops/retail returns items[], low_stock[], attachment_rate_today, retail_revenue_today. Each item has margin_pct, low_stock boolean, revenue_30d
verified_features.SPA_OPS_reputation: PASS - GET /api/spa-ops/reputation returns nps (float), responses, promoters, passives, detractors, feedback[], recovery_queue[]. NPS formula verified: (promoters - detractors)/responses*100
verified_features.SPA_OPS_actions: PASS - GET /api/spa-ops/actions returns actions[] with each item having kind ('alert'|'recommend'|'info'), severity ('high'|'warn'|'info'), msg. Count >= 1
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_providers: PASS - GET /api/pos-adapter/providers returns 4 providers (mock, webhook, micros, toast)
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_config_put_masks_token: PASS - PUT /api/pos-adapter/config saves configuration. Response auth_token is masked (contains •) and raw token is NOT leaked
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_config_get_excludes_token: PASS - GET /api/pos-adapter/config returns configured=true, masked auth_token_masked, and excludes raw auth_token
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_drain_mock: PASS - POST /api/pos-adapter/drain with provider=mock marks all pending pos_outbound items delivered, returns provider, attempted, delivered, failed
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_drain_webhook_fail: PASS - POST /api/pos-adapter/drain with provider=webhook to unreachable endpoint marks items as failed and increments attempts
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_test_connection: PASS - POST /api/pos-adapter/test-connection returns log entry with status, http_status, duration_ms
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_summary: PASS - GET /api/pos-adapter/summary returns provider, active, queue{pending,delivered,dead}, last_attempt
verified_features.POS_ADAPTER_delivery_log: PASS - GET /api/pos-adapter/delivery-log returns items[] with provider, kind, action, status, http_status, duration_ms
verified_features.SECURITY_no_id_leak_spa_ops: PASS - No _id field leaked in any spa-ops response (9 endpoints checked)
verified_features.SECURITY_no_id_leak_pos_adapter: PASS - No _id field leaked in any pos-adapter response (4 endpoints checked)

spa_ops_utilization_keyerror.issue: KeyError: 'type' when room documents don't have 'type' field
spa_ops_utilization_keyerror.fix: Changed r['type'] to r.get('type', 'single') and r['name'] to r.get('name', 'Room'). Also added defensive check for missing 'id' field.

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed spa services for POS drain testing. Spa-ops auto-seeds therapists(5), rooms(8), members(10), retail(5), feedback(30) on first call. Synthesizes bookings if spa_bookings < 50 docs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 140 adds two major modules: (1) SPA-OPS - 10 endpoints for spa command dashboard with 8-zone KPI engine. Auto-seeds demo data (therapists/rooms/members/retail/feedback) and synthesizes bookings if sparse. All utilization/rate values are 0..1. NPS formula: (promoters-detractors)/responses*100. Actions feed always returns >= 1 action. (2) POS-ADAPTER - 7 endpoints for configurable POS connector. Supports mock/webhook/micros/toast providers. Auth token is masked in responses (never leaked). Drain with mock delivers all; drain with unreachable webhook fails and increments attempts. Dead-letter after 5 failed attempts (status='dead'). Collections: spa_therapists, spa_rooms, spa_members, spa_retail_items, spa_feedback, pos_adapter_config, pos_delivery_log. All responses exclude _id.
